Izzadásgátló dezodor tartalmaz ásványi anyagokat, amelyek frissítik és kezeli a bőrt, anélkül, hogy a zavaró fehér foltokat ruhát. The tools are stored in a plastic case for easy storage and transport. items.raw_desc:
Kerékpárszállító tetőre AMOS kerékpártartó:



	
		
			The great advantage of the AMOS carrier is the proven and at the same time completely simple 3-point quick-release mechanism. It can hold one bicycle and is designed to be mounted on the roof of your car. Simply clamp the bicycle by the frame tube into the quick-release nut . Then you simply fasten the rims with the straps and you can set off. The nut is robust, easy to grip in the palm of your hand and is also equipped with a lock to secure the bike against theft. You will be able to move away from your car with the knowledge that your bike is completely safe in the AMOS bike carrier. 
		
	
	
		
			
				Key features of AMOS car roof carrier
			
			
				Reliable 3-point clamping system
				Well-fitting wide nut
				Lockable system
				Designed for roof mounting
				Load capacity 18 kg
				Holds 1 bicycle

items.raw_desc: Digitális hőmérő EINHELL Digitális infravörös hőmérő TC-IT 550, 2270180:The Einhell TC-IT 550 infrared thermometer is a practical helper for the home and the workshop and enables fast and accurate temperature measurement of common objects. Whether it's for repairs or maintenance, measuring the temperature of pipes, pizza ovens or refrigerators, or detecting poor insulation in windows and doors: the thermometer allows continuous temperature measurement with laser focusing in the range -50 °C to +550 °C. The measuring point is determined by a clearly visible laser point. The working distance is between 0.3 and 1.2 m. Before measuring, you can select one of three emissivity levels according to the surface you want to measure on. Thanks to the backlit LCD display, the measured values are clearly displayed. One button to switch units between °C and °F. To save energy, the infrared thermometer automatically switches off after 1 minute of inactivity. Two AA batteries are required for operation and are not included.                     Key features of the digital infrared thermometer...
